title: iria juncea
intro: Iria juncea, also known as the 'Golden Chamomile', is a plant species that belongs to the genus Iria. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Iria juncea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues. Iria juncea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
